title: Pending Degree College Building Construction
description: The foundation was laid 3 years ago, but construction has halted due to lack of fund release from the state education board. Students are currently using a dilapidated high school building.

history.notes: Verified by Core Committee. Currently discussing with local student unions.

title: Main Road Potholes & Drainage Block
description: Severe water logging during mild rains due to uncleared drainage systems. Road surface completely deteriorated.
